params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: definitionId
params.description: Filter releases by release definition ID

params.name: definitionEnvironmentId
params.description: Filter releases by definition environment ID

params.name: searchText
params.description: Search by release name

params.name: createdBy
params.description: Filter releases created by a specific user (descriptor)

params.name: statusFilter
params.description: Filter by release status

params.name: environmentStatusFilter
params.description: Filter by environment status

params.name: minCreatedTime
params.description: Returns releases created after this date

params.name: maxCreatedTime
params.description: Returns releases created before this date

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of releases to return

params.name: continuationToken
params.description: Continuation token for paginated results

params.name: $expand
params.description: Expand additional release details

items.docs: Returns a list of releases in the project. Supports filtering by definition, status, environment name, and date ranges. Results are paginated using continuationToken.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

items.docs: Creates a new release based on a release definition. You can specify which artifacts to use, add a description, override variables, and optionally save as a draft before deployment.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: releaseId
params.description: Numeric ID of the release

params.name: $expand
params.description: Expand additional release details

params.name: approvalFilters
params.description: Filter type for approval details

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific release, including all environments, deployment status, artifacts used, and approval history.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: releaseId
params.description: Numeric ID of the release to update

items.docs: Updates a release, such as changing its status from draft to active, updating the description, or modifying environment configurations.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: searchText
params.description: Filter definitions by name (supports wildcards)

params.name: $expand
params.description: Expand additional definition details

params.name: artifactType
params.description: Filter definitions by artifact type

params.name: artifactSourceId
params.description: Filter definitions by artifact source ID

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of definitions to return

params.name: continuationToken
params.description: Continuation token for paged results

params.name: queryOrder
params.description: Results ordering

params.name: path
params.description: Filter definitions by folder path

items.docs: Returns a list of release definitions in the project. Supports filtering by name and path. Definitions represent the release pipeline template including environments, artifacts, approval gates, and deployment steps.

info.name: Azure DevOps Create a release definition

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

items.docs: Creates a new release definition specifying environments, artifacts, triggers, variables, and deployment steps. The definition serves as the template for future release instances.

info.name: Azure DevOps Get a release definition

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: definitionId
params.description: Numeric ID of the release definition

params.name: $expand
params.description: Expand additional definition details

params.name: propertyFilters
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific release definition, including all environments, artifact sources, triggers, approvals, and deployment steps.

info.name: Azure DevOps Update a release definition

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: definitionId
params.description: Numeric ID of the release definition to update

items.docs: Replaces an existing release definition with the provided definition. The revision number in the body must match the current revision to prevent concurrent modification conflicts.

info.name: Azure DevOps Delete a release definition

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: definitionId
params.description: Numeric ID of the release definition to delete

params.name: comment
params.description: Comment explaining why the definition is being deleted

params.name: forceDelete
params.description: Force delete even if there are associated releases

items.docs: Deletes a release definition. All associated releases must be deleted or abandoned first. This operation cannot be undone.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: definitionId
params.description: Filter deployments by release definition ID

params.name: definitionEnvironmentId
params.description: Filter deployments by environment ID within the definition

params.name: createdBy
params.description: Filter deployments triggered by a specific user

params.name: minModifiedTime
params.description: Returns deployments modified after this date

params.name: maxModifiedTime
params.description: Returns deployments modified before this date

params.name: deploymentStatus
params.description: Filter by deployment status

params.name: operationStatus
params.description: Filter by operation status

params.name: latestAttemptsOnly
params.description: Return only the latest deployment attempt for each environment

params.name: queryOrder
params.description: Sort order for results

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of deployments to return

params.name: continuationToken
params.description: Continuation token for paginated results

params.name: projectName
params.description: Project name filter

items.docs: Returns a list of deployments across all release definitions and environments in the project. Supports filtering by definition, environment, and deployment status. Useful for auditing and monitoring deployment activity.
